agencies.name: Niagara Transit
agencies.overrideNote: Niagara Transit’s GTFS feed included auxiliary two- and three-stop records for routes 209 and 216 that made those routes appear to run every 1–5 minutes. We filtered those records so the map reflects the published 30-minute-plus service.

agencies.name: Stratford Transit
agencies.overrideNote: The "Lights On Stratford" shuttle is a seasonal hop-on hop-off route that only runs mid-December to mid-January, but it was showing up on the map year-round. We've hidden it until the transit agency fixes their schedule data.

agencies.name: HOCTS (Utica-Rome)
agencies.overrideNote: Upstream trips.txt service_ids have zero overlap with calendar.txt/calendar_dates.txt (dangling references) — every trip resolves to 0 active departures. Not an Atlas pipeline bug; feed itself is malformed. Tracked in #216.

agencies.name: Des Moines Area Regional Transit Authority (DART)
Roswell Transit
agencies.overrideNote: Real fixed-route bus service (route_type 3, ordered stop sequences) but upstream feed never published shapes.txt — nothing to draw on the map. Needs a stop-sequence fallback capability Atlas doesn't have yet. Tracked in #216.

agencies.name: Tangipahoa Transit (Hammond)
agencies.overrideNote: Real fixed-route bus service (route_type 3, ordered stop sequences) but shapes.txt is present with header only — every trip's shape_id is blank. Needs a stop-sequence fallback capability Atlas doesn't have yet. Tracked in #216.

agencies.name: University of Michigan Transit Services (Ann Arbor)
Seattle Streetcar
agencies.overrideNote: City of Seattle (agency_id 23) inside KCM multi-agency GTFS; filter to agency 23 on process to avoid duplicating Metro/ST.
